title: ononis natrix f. striata
intro: Ononis natrix f. striata, also known as the striated restharrow, is a flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The striated restharrow has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Ononis natrix f. striata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various conditions, including skin issues and digestive problems.
